skills.name: Multi Shot
skills.description: Quickly fires a number of arrows at the targeted area.

skills.name: Swift Step
skills.description: Allows you to attack while moving quickly. Increases the Evasion and Archer's Movement Speed when using basic attack and some skills.
skills.effect_text:
Increase Evasion by CaptionRatio2 %
Duration: 30 minutes
Skill that applies increase in Movement Speed
- Oblique Shot
- Twin Arrows
- Critical Shot
- Spiral Arrow
- Spread Shot
- Dark Judgement
- Guided Shot

skills.name: Oblique Shot
skills.description: Fires an arrow that bounces off of the target to hit an adjacent enemy. Enemies hit by Oblique Shot have a chance of becoming afflicted with Slow.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger Musket TwoHandCannon
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
[Slow] Chance: CaptionRatio %
[Slow] Duration: 7 seconds

skills.name: Twin Arrow
skills.description: Shoot 2 arrows to enemy at once. Damage +50% to enemies with cloth armor.

skills.name: Concentration
skills.description: Concentrate to momentarily increase your critical rate.

skills.name: Leap
skills.description: Perform a backward leap. You are immune to damage while leaping and you are no longer in combat state after you land.

attributes.name: Multi Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Multi Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Oblique Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Oblique Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Twin Arrows: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Twin Arrow] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Swift Step: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Swift Step]'s evasion increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Concentration: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Concentration]'s critical rate increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Leap: Dexterity
attributes.description:
* Reduces the cooldown of [Leap] by 5 seconds

* Increases Movement Speed by 10-20 for 3 seconds after using [Leap]

attributes.name: [Arts] Multi Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Multi Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Oblique Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Oblique Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Twin Arrow: Enhanced Upgrade

attributes.name: Concentration: Hawkeye
attributes.description:
* Remove increase Critical Rate effect of [Concentration]

* Duration changed to 5 seconds

* Enemy can not evade during the buff duration
